flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Washington University in St Louis rose 15% between 2006 and 2009 ($33.8k → $38.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Washington University in St Louis rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($58.9k → $65.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Washington University in St Louis fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Washington University in St Louis are 85% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($86.2k vs $46.7k).
